title: ilex discolor var. discolor
intro: Ilex discolor var. discolor, also known as the Japanese Holly, is a shrub or small tree species native to East Asia, characterized by its dark green leaves and bright red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Ilex discolor var. discolor include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and berries, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
